mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_datatypes_user ( DATATYPE_ID, DATATYPE_LABEL, CREATE_USER, RRN, RRN_CNT, RRN_DUP, FOREIGNER, FOREIGNER_CNT, FOREIGNER_DUP, DRIVER, DRIVER_CNT, DRIVER_DUP, PASSPORT, PASSPORT_CNT, PASSPORT_DUP, ACCOUNT, ACCOUNT_CNT, ACCOUNT_DUP, CARD, CARD_CNT, CARD_DUP, MOBILE_PHONE, MOBILE_PHONE_CNT, MOBILE_PHONE_DUP, LOCAL_PHONE, LOCAL_PHONE_CNT, LOCAL_PHONE_DUP, EMAIL, EMAIL_CNT, EMAIL_DUP, OCR, RECENT, CAPTURE, AP_NO, STD_ID ) VALUES ( #{datatype_id}, #{datatype_label}, #{create_user},
1, #{rrn}, #{rrn_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{frn}, #{frn_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{dri}, #{dri_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{pas}, #{pas_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{acc}, #{acc_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{card}, #{card_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{mob}, #{mob_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{local}, #{local_dup}, 0,0,0,
1, #{email}, #{email_dup}, 0,0,0,
#{ocr}, #{recent}, #{capture}, #{ap_no}, #{std_id} )
mapper.select:
SELECT DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, DATATYPE_LABEL, CREATE_USER, RRN, RRN_CNT, RRN_DUP, FOREIGNER, FOREIGNER_CNT, FOREIGNER_DUP, DRIVER, DRIVER_CNT, DRIVER_DUP, PASSPORT, PASSPORT_CNT, PASSPORT_DUP, ACCOUNT, ACCOUNT_CNT, ACCOUNT_DUP, CARD, CARD_CNT, CARD_DUP, MOBILE_PHONE, MOBILE_PHONE_CNT, MOBILE_PHONE_DUP, LOCAL_PHONE, LOCAL_PHONE_CNT, LOCAL_PHONE_DUP, EMAIL, EMAIL_CNT,EMAIL_DUP, OCR, RECENT, CAPTURE FROM PI_AP_SERVER AP, PI_DATATYPES_USER DU WHERE 1=1 AND DU.ENABLE = 1 AND AP.AP_NO = DU.AP_NO AND AP.IS_SERVER = 1
AND DU.STD_ID = #{datatype_id}
AND DU.DATATYPE_LABEL like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY DU.STD_ID ORDER BY DU.DATATYPE_LABEL

SELECT IF(SPS.POLICY_ID IS NULL, 0, 1) AS POLICY_CHK, T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, IFNULL(A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP,'-') AS IP, T.PLATFORM, IFNULL(A.AGENT_CONNECTED, 1) AS CONNECTED, (SELECT SP.POLICY_NAME FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY SP WHERE SP.IDX = SPS.POLICY_ID) AS POLICY_NAME FROM pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scan_policy_server SPS ON T.TARGET_ID = SPS.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = SPS.AP_NO WHERE T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND SPS.POLICY_ID = #{idx}
AND T.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchServer},'%')
AND A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchIp},'%')
GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ORDER BY T.NAME
mapper.update:
UPDATE pi_datatypes_user SET DATATYPE_ID = #{datatype_id}, DATATYPE_LABEL = #{datatype_label},
RRN=1, RRN_CNT=#{rrn}, RRN_DUP=#{rrn_dup}, RRN=0, RRN_CNT=0, RRN_DUP=0,
FOREIGNER=1, FOREIGNER_CNT=#{frn}, FOREIGNER_DUP=#{rrn_dup}, FOREIGNER=0, FOREIGNER_CNT=0, FOREIGNER_DUP=0,
DRIVER=1, DRIVER_CNT=#{dri}, DRIVER_DUP=#{dri_dup}, DRIVER=0, DRIVER_CNT=0, DRIVER_DUP=0,
PASSPORT=1, PASSPORT_CNT=#{pas}, PASSPORT_DUP=#{pas_dup}, PASSPORT=0, PASSPORT_CNT=0, PASSPORT_DUP=0,
ACCOUNT=1, ACCOUNT_CNT=#{acc}, ACCOUNT_DUP=#{acc_dup}, ACCOUNT=0, ACCOUNT_CNT=0, ACCOUNT_DUP=0,
CARD=1, CARD_CNT=#{card}, CARD_DUP=#{card_dup}, CARD=0, CARD_CNT=0, CARD_DUP=0,
MOBILE_PHONE=1, MOBILE_PHONE_CNT=#{mob}, MOBILE_PHONE_DUP=#{mob_dup}, MOBILE_PHONE=0, MOBILE_PHONE_CNT=0, MOBILE_PHONE_DUP=0,
LOCAL_PHONE=1, LOCAL_PHONE_CNT=#{local}, LOCAL_PHONE_DUP=#{local_dup}, LOCAL_PHONE=0, LOCAL_PHONE_CNT=0, LOCAL_PHONE_DUP=0,
EMAIL=1, EMAIL_CNT=#{email}, EMAIL_DUP=#{email_dup}, EMAIL=0, EMAIL_CNT=0, EMAIL_DUP=0,
OCR=#{ocr}, RECENT=#{recent}, CAPTURE=#{capture} WHERE 1 = 1 AND STD_ID = #{std_id} AND AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND ENABLE = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(STD_ID) FROM PI_DATATYPES_USER WHERE STD_ID = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_DATATYPES_USER SET DATATYPE = #{new_std_id} WHERE STD_ID = #{std_id} AND ENABLE = 1
mapper.select: SELECT datatype_id, datatype_label, create_user, regdate, rrn ,foreigner, driver, passport, account, card ,phone, mobile_phone, local_phone, email, rrn_cnt, foreigner_cnt ,driver_cnt, passport_cnt, account_cnt, card_cnt, phone_cnt ,mobile_phone_cnt, local_phone_cnt, email_cnt, ocr, capture, enable FROM PI_DATATYPES_USER WHERE DATATYPE_ID = #{DATATYPE_ID} GROUP BY DATATYPE_ID

SELECT datatype_id AS DATATYPE_ID ,datatype_label AS TYPE ,rrn AS RRN ,rrn_cnt AS RRN_CNT ,rrn_dup AS RRN_DUP ,foreigner AS FOREIGNER ,foreigner_cnt AS FOREIGNER_CNT ,foreigner_dup AS FOREIGNER_DUP ,driver AS DRIVER ,driver_cnt AS DRIVER_CNT ,driver_dup AS DRIVER_DUP ,passport AS PASSPORT ,passport_cnt AS PASSPORT_CNT ,passport_dup AS PASSPORT_DUP ,ACCOUNT AS ACCOUNT ,account_cnt AS ACCOUNT_CNT ,account_dup AS ACCOUNT_DUP ,card AS CARD ,card_cnt AS CARD_CNT ,card_dup AS CARD_DUP ,phone AS PHONE ,phone_cnt AS PHONE_CNT ,phone_dup AS PHONE_DUP ,mobile_phone AS MOBILE_PHONE ,mobile_phone_cnt AS MOBILE_PHONE_CNT ,mobile_phone_dup AS MOBILE_PHONE_DUP ,local_phone AS LOCAL_PHONE ,local_phone_cnt AS LOCAL_PHONE_CNT ,local_phone_dup AS LOCAL_PHONE_DUP ,email AS EMAIL ,email_cnt AS EMAIL_CNT ,email_dup AS EMAIL_DUP FROM pi_datatypes_user WHERE datatype_id = #{datatype_id}
mapper.insert:
REPLACE INTO PI_SCAN_POLICY_SERVER (POLICY_ID, TARGET_ID, AP_NO, REGDATE) VALUES
(#{idx}, #{item.target_id}, #{item.ap_no}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT DATA.TARGET_ID, DATA.AP_NO, DATA.FULL_NAME, DATA.HOST_NAME, DATA.NAME, DATA.SERIAL, DATA.PLATFORM, DATA.TARGET_USE, DATA.PATH_CNT, DATA.TOTAL, DATA.REGDATE, DATA.SCHEDULE_ID, DATA.LOCATION_ID, DATA.DATATYPE_ID, IFNULL(DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS,"") AS SCHEDULE_STATUS, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, DATA.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, DATA.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS, DATA.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_MONTHS, DATA.SCAN_TIME, DATA.GROUP_NAME, DATA.USER_NO, DATA.USER_NAME,
DATA.CONFIRM, DATA.POLICY_ID, DATA.ENABLE, DATA.POLICY_NM, DATA.MEMO FROM ( SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME AS FULL_NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', 1) AS HOST_NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -2), '.', 1) AS NAME, SUBSTRING_INDEX(T.NAME, '.', -1) AS SERIAL, T.PLATFORM, T.TARGET_USE, MAX_TP.PATH_CNT, MAX_TP.TOTAL, MAX_TP.REGDATE, SD.SCHEDULE_ID, SDL.LOCATION_ID, SD.SCHEDULE_DATATYPE_PROFILES AS DATATYPE_ID, SD.SCHEDULE_STATUS, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, SD.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, SD.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_DAYS, SD.SCHEDULE_REPEAT_MONTHS, FROM_UNIXTIME(SD.SCHEDULE_NEXT_SCAN,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS SCAN_TIME,
(SELECT (CASE WHEN COUNT(SG.NAME) > 1 THEN CONCAT(SG.NAME, ' 외 ', COUNT(SG.NAME)-1,'개') ELSE SG.NAME END) FROM PI_SERVER_GROUP SG, PI_SERVER_GROUP_JOIN SJ WHERE SJ.TARGET_ID= T.TARGET_ID AND SJ.AP_NO = T.AP_NO AND SJ.GROUP_IDX = SG.IDX) AS GROUP_NAME,
TU.USER_NO, (SELECT(CASE WHEN COUNT(TU.user_no)>1 THEN CONCAT(UA.user_name ,'(' , AG.team_name, ')' , ' 외 ' ,COUNT(TU.USER_NO)-1, '명') ELSE CONCAT(UA.USER_NAME, '(', AG.TEAM_NAME, ')') END) FROM pi_user UA, pi_target_user TU,pi_group AG WHERE TU.TARGET_ID= T.TARGET_ID AND TU.AP_NO = T.AP_NO AND UA.user_no = TU.USER_NO AND AG.insa_code = UA.INSA_CODE) AS USER_NAME,
MAX_STS.CONFIRM, MAX_STS.POLICY_ID, IFNULL(SP.ENABLE, 2) AS ENABLE, IFNULL(SP.POLICY_NAME,'') AS POLICY_NM, '' AS MEMO FROM pi_ap_server AP, pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_AGENTS A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_ACCOUNT_INFO AI ON T.NAME = AI.HOST_NM AND T.AP_NO = 0 AND A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP = AI.ip LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_TARGET_GROUP TG ON AI.group_id = TG.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_service_user SU ON T.TARGET_ID = SU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = SU.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_target_user TU ON T.TARGET_ID = TU.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = TU.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TP.TARGET_ID, TP.AP_NO, TP.PATH_CNT, TP.TOTAL, TP.REGDATE FROM pi_topcomp TP, (SELECT TCP.TARGET_ID, TCP.AP_NO ,MAX(TCP.REGDATE) AS REGDATE FROM pi_topcomp TCP GROUP BY TCP.TARGET_ID, TCP.AP_NO) TCP WHERE TCP.TARGET_ID = TP.TARGET_ID AND TCP.AP_NO = TP.AP_NO AND TP.REGDATE = TCP.REGDATE ) AS MAX_TP ON T.TARGET_ID = MAX_TP.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = MAX_TP.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ST.TARGET_ID, ST.AP_NO, ST.LOCATION_ID, ST.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID,ST.REGDATE, ST.POLICY_ID, ST.CONFIRM FROM pi_schedule_targets ST, (SELECT STS.TARGET_ID, STS.AP_NO ,MAX(STS.REGDATE) AS REGDATE FROM pi_schedule_targets STS GROUP BY STS.TARGET_ID, STS.AP_NO) STS WHERE STS.TARGET_ID = ST.TARGET_ID AND STS.AP_NO = ST.AP_NO AND STS.REGDATE = ST.REGDATE ) AS MAX_STS ON T.TARGET_ID = MAX_STS.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = MAX_STS.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scan_policy SP ON MAX_STS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedules SD ON MAX_STS.AP_NO = SD.AP_NO AND MAX_STS.RECON_SCHEDULE_ID = SD.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scheduled_location SDL ON MAX_STS.AP_NO = SDL.AP_NO AND SDL.SCH_ID = SD.SCHEDULE_ID AND SD.SCHEDULE_TARGET_ID = SDL.TARGET_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO
AND (SU.USER_NO = '${user_no}' OR TU.USER_NO = '${user_no}')
AND (SU.USER_NO = '${user_no}' OR TU.USER_NO = '${user_no}' )
AND T.NAME LIKE concat('%', #{sch_host}, '%')
AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y' GROUP BY T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO ) DATA WHERE 1= 1
AND DATA.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sch_group}, '%')
ORDER BY
FIELD(DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS, 'failed', 'stalled', 'deactivated', 'queued', 'interrupted', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'stop', 'paused', 'scanning', 'scheduled') DESC, DATA.NAME DESC, DATA.SCHEDULE_STATUS DESC

SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_GRADE AS CHKBOX, '' as USER_PHONE_STATUS, U.USER_EMAIL, U.USER_NO, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, (SELECT G.TEAM_NAME FROM PI_GROUP G WHERE G.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE) AS TEAM_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(U.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%s' ) AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(U.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(U.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS ENDDATE, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_GRADE AS OLD_USER_GRADE, IFNULL(U.USER_PHONE, '') AS USER_PHONE, IFNULL(U.USER_TEL, '') AS USER_TEL, if(NOW() > LOCK_DATE, 'N', 'Y') AS LOCK_ACCOUNT, U.ACCESS_IP, U.LOCK_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(U.LOGINDATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS LOGINDATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(U.LOGINDATE, INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LOGINDATE2, U.UNLOCK_REASON, '' AS MEMBER_STATUS, U.ACC_YN, (CASE WHEN U.ACC_YN = 'Y' THEN '재직자' ELSE '퇴직자' END) AS ACC_YN_NM, LOCK_EMAIL
FROM PI_USER U WHERE 1 = 1 #AND U.USER_GRADE != '9'
AND U.USER_GRADE = #{sch_aut}
AND U.USER_NO LIKE concat('%', #{sch_id}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE concat('%', #{sch_userName}, '%')
AND (SELECT G.TEAM_NAME FROM PI_GROUP G WHERE G.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE) LIKE concat('%', #{sch_teamName}, '%')
AND U.ACC_YN = 'Y'
AND U.ACC_YN = 'N'
AND DATE_FORMAT(U.LOGINDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND U.LOCK_STATUS = ${sch_lockStatus}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_schedules ( schedule_id, schedule_status, schedule_label, schedule_repeat_days, schedule_repeat_months, schedule_datatype_profiles, schedule_next_scan, schedule_target_id, schedule_target_name, schedule_cpu, schedule_capture, schedule_trace, ap_no,
schedule_pause_days,
schedule_pause_from,
schedule_pause_to,
drm_status, regdate ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{status}, #{label}, #{repeat_days}, #{repeat_months}, #{profiles}, #{next_scan}, #{target_id}, #{target_name}, #{cpu}, #{capture}, #{trace}, #{ap_no},
#{pause_days},
#{pause_from},
#{pause_to},
#{drm}, now() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE schedule_label=#{label}, schedule_status=#{status}, schedule_repeat_days=#{repeat_days}, schedule_repeat_months=#{repeat_months}, schedule_datatype_profiles=#{profiles}, schedule_cpu=#{cpu}, schedule_capture=#{capture}, schedule_target_id=#{target_id}, schedule_target_name=#{target_name}, schedule_trace=#{trace}, schedule_next_scan=#{next_scan},
schedule_pause_days=#{pause_days},
schedule_pause_from=#{pause_from},
schedule_pause_to=#{pause_to},
drm_status=#{drm},
regdate=now()
mapper.select:
SELECT D.*, CASE WHEN D.COUNT>1 THEN '-' ELSE (SELECT POLICY_NAME FROM pi_scan_policy SP WHERE SP.IDX = POLICY_ID) END AS POLICY_NAME FROM (SELECT G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, G.USER_NO, (SELECT U.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER U WHERE U.USER_NO = G.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, G.STATUS, G.TYPE, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT POLICY_ID) FROM PI_SCHEDULE_TARGETS ST WHERE G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID) AS COUNT, (SELECT ST.POLICY_ID FROM pi_schedule_targets ST WHERE G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.schedule_group_id LIMIT 1) AS POLICY_ID, #G.DATATYPE_ID, ST.DATATYPE_ID, DU.DATATYPE_LABEL, DATE_FORMAT(G.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(SP.START_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS START_DTM, T.TARGET_ID FROM pi_schedule_group G LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_datatypes_user DU ON G.STD_ID = DU.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_scan_policy SP ON G.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_schedule_targets ST ON G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID = ST.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON ST.TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND G.USER_NO = '${user_no}'
AND G.TYPE = ${sch_type}
AND G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', '${title}', '%')
AND T.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY G.SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID) D WHERE 1 = 1
AND D.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', '${writer}', '%')
AND D.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY D.REGDATE DESC, D.SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pi_schedule_group ( SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, USER_NO, STATUS, TYPE, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{scheduleName}, #{user_no}, '1', #{type}, #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID

INSERT INTO pi_schedule_group ( SCHEDULE_GROUP_NAME, USER_NO, STATUS, TYPE, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, STD_ID, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{scheduleName}, #{user_no}, '1', '2', #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, #{std_id}, NOW() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID

INSERT INTO pi_schedule_targets ( TARGET_ID, LOCATION_ID, AP_NO, SCHEDULE_GROUP_ID, RECON_SCHEDULE_ID, STATUS, POLICY_ID, DATATYPE_ID, CONFIRM, ACTION, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{target_id}, #{location_id}, #{ap_no}, #{groupID}, #{reconScheduleID}, "1", #{policy_id}, #{datatype_id}, 0, #{action}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT T.TARGET_ID, '8987302884414283716' AS LOCATION_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, DU.DATATYPE_ID, SP.STD_ID, NS.POLICY_ID, SP.ACTION, NS.TRACE, IFNULL(NS.DRM_STATUS, 'NONE') AS DRM_STATUS FROM pi_targets T, skt_net_schedule NS, pi_scan_policy SP, pi_datatypes_user DU, pi_locations L WHERE NS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX
AND L.NET_ID = NS.NET_ID AND NS.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID
AND T.NET_ID = NS.NET_ID
AND SP.STD_ID = DU.STD_ID AND T.AP_NO = DU.AP_NO AND T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND NS.ENABLE = 'Y' AND T.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND L.LOCATION_ID = #{location_id} AND T.AP_NO = #{ap_no}

SELECT T.TARGET_ID, T.AP_NO, T.NAME, A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, L.LOCATION_ID FROM pi_targets T LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_LOCATIONS L ON T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND (L.DESCRIPTION REGEXP 'Catalog|All local files') WHERE T.AP_NO != 0 AND A.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP REGEXP #{net_ip}
SELECT MAX(NET_ID)+1 AS NET_ID FROM skt_net_schedule
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE (NET_ID, NET_TYPE, AP_NO, NET_TYPE_ID, NET_TYPE_NM, POLICY_ID, REGDATE, TRACE, DRM_STATUS, SCANDAY) VALUES (#{net_id}, #{type}, #{ap_no}, #{rangeId}, #{rangeNm}, #{policyId}, NOW(), #{trace}, #{drm}, #{scanday})

INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE (NET_ID, NET_TYPE, AP_NO, NET_TYPE_ID, LOCATION_ID, NET_TYPE_NM, POLICY_ID, REGDATE, TRACE, DRM_STATUS, SCANDAY) VALUES (#{net_id}, #{type}, #{ap_no}, #{targetId}, #{rangeId}, #{rangeOneDriveNm}, #{policyId}, NOW(), #{trace}, #{drm}, NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET NET_TYPE = #{type}, AP_NO = #{ap_no}, location_id = null, NET_TYPE_ID = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_NM = #{rangeNm}, POLICY_ID = #{policyId}, REGDATE = NOW(), TRACE = #{trace}, SCANDAY = #{scanday}, DRM_STATUS = #{drm} WHERE NET_ID = #{net_id}

UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET NET_TYPE = #{type}, AP_NO = #{rangeId}, location_id = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_ID = #{rangeId}, NET_TYPE_NM = #{rangeOneDriveNm}, POLICY_ID = #{policyId}, REGDATE = NOW(), TRACE = #{trace}, DAY = #{day}, DRM_STATUS = NULL WHERE NET_ID = #{net_id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE_TIME (NET_ID, SCHEDULE_TIME, NET_TYPE_NM) VALUES
(#{net_id}, #{item}, #{rangeNm})

INSERT INTO SKT_NET_SCHEDULE_TIME (NET_ID, SCHEDULE_TIME, NET_TYPE_NM) VALUES
(#{net_id}, #{item}, #{rangeNm})
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_targets T, (SELECT * FROM (WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{rangeId} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.UP_IDX = CTE.INSA_CODE ) SELECT TU.TARGET_ID, TU.AP_NO FROM CTE, pi_user U, pi_target_user TU WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO AND TU.AP_NO != 0) AS D) D SET T.NET_ID = #{net_id} WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = D.AP_NO AND T.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
UPDATE SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SET ENABLE = 'N' WHERE NET_ID = #{before_net_id} AND LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT (CASE WHEN (D.TYPE = 3 AND D.PC_COUNT > 1 ) THEN CONCAT(NET_TYPE_NAME ,'외 ', PC_COUNT-1, '건' )ELSE NET_TYPE_NAME END ) AS NET_TYPE_NM , D.* FROM (SELECT NS.NET_ID, NS.NET_TYPE AS TYPE, NS.AP_NO, SP.DATATYPE_ID, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 0 THEN '네트워크' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 1 THEN '그룹' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 2 THEN 'PC' ELSE 'OneDrive' END) AS TYPE_NM, NS.NET_TYPE_ID, L.LOCATION_ID, NS.NET_TYPE_NM AS NET_TYPE_NAME, T.PLATFORM, A.AGENT_CONNECTED, NS.POLICY_ID, SP.POLICY_NAME, NS.TRACE, NS.DRM_STATUS, NS.SCANDAY, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE != 3 THEN (SELECT COUNT(T.NAME) FROM pi_targets T WHERE NS.NET_ID =T.NET_ID AND T.AP_NO != 0) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(L.PATH) FROM pi_locations L WHERE NS.NET_ID =L.NET_ID ) END) AS PC_COUNT, DATE_FORMAT(NS.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REGDATE FROM skt_net_schedule NS LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON NS.NET_TYPE_ID = T.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_locations L ON T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND NS.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID AND NS.NET_ID = L.NET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_agents A ON T.NAME = A.AGENT_NAME AND T.AP_NO = A.AP_NO , pi_scan_policy SP WHERE NS.POLICY_ID = SP.IDX AND NS.ENABLE = 'Y'
AND SP.POLICY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{net_nm},'%')
GROUP BY NS.NET_ID ORDER BY NS.REGDATE DESC) D

SELECT NS.NET_ID, NS.NET_TYPE AS TYPE, ST.SCHEDULE_TIME, (CASE WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 0 THEN '네트워크' WHEN NS.NET_TYPE = 1 THEN '그룹' ELSE 'PC' END) AS TYPE_NM FROM skt_net_schedule NS, skt_net_schedule_time ST WHERE 1=1 AND NS.NET_ID = ST.NET_ID
AND NS.NET_ID = #{net_id}

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{group_id} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.INSA_CODE = CTE.UP_IDX ) SELECT SNS.NET_ID FROM CTE, skt_net_schedule SNS WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 1 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y' AND CTE.INSA_CODE != #{group_id} ORDER BY CTE.LEVEL LIMIT 1

WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = (SELECT U.INSA_CODE FROM PI_TARGET_USER TU, PI_USER U WHERE TU.TARGET_ID = #{group_id} AND TU.AP_NO = #{ap_no} AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO) UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.INSA_CODE = CTE.UP_IDX ) SELECT SNS.NET_ID FROM CTE, skt_net_schedule SNS WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 1 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y' ORDER BY CTE.LEVEL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE PI_TARGETS T, SKT_NET_SCHEDULE SNS SET T.NET_ID = SNS.NET_ID WHERE T.NET_ID = #{NET_ID} AND CONCAT('TYPE',T.NET_TYPE) = SNS.NET_TYPE_ID AND SNS.NET_TYPE = 0 AND SNS.ENABLE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT LPAD(COUNT(*)+1, '2', '0') AS COUNT FROM pi_schedule_group G WHERE DATE_FORMAT(G.REGDATE, '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AND G.USER_NO = #{user_no}

SELECT SNI.TYPE, SNI.TYPE_NAME, IFNULL(SNI.TYPE_CLASS, '-') AS TYPE_CLASS, SNI.IP, SNI.MASK, SNI.MASK_IP, DATE_FORMAT(SNI.REGDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE FROM SKT_NET_IP SNI WHERE 1=1
AND SNI.TYPE = #{net_type}
AND SNI.IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{net_ip}, '%')
AND SNI.TYPE_CLASS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{net_type_class}, '%')
AND SNI.REGDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY TYPE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_IP (TYPE, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_CLASS, IP, MASK, MASK_IP, REGDATE) VALUES (#{type}, #{type_name}, #{type_class}, #{ip}, #{mask}, #{mask_ip}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_targets T, (SELECT * FROM (WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS (SELECT 0 AS LEVEL, G.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, G.TEAM_NAME AS FULL_TEAM_NM, G.UP_IDX FROM pi_group G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.INSA_CODE = #{beforeRangeId} UNION ALL SELECT CTE.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, PG.INSA_CODE, PG.TEAM_NAME, CONCAT(CTE.FULL_TEAM_NM, '>', PG.TEAM_NAME) AS FULL_TEAM_NM, PG.UP_IDX FROM pi_group PG, CTE WHERE PG.UP_IDX = CTE.INSA_CODE ) SELECT TU.TARGET_ID, TU.AP_NO FROM CTE, pi_user U, pi_target_user TU WHERE CTE.INSA_CODE = U.INSA_CODE AND TU.USER_NO = U.USER_NO AND TU.AP_NO != 0) AS D) D SET T.NET_ID = NULL WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.TARGET_ID = D.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = D.AP_NO
UPDATE PI_LOCATIONS SET NET_ID = NULL WHERE 1=1 AND NET_ID = #{net_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SKT_NET_IP (TYPE, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_CLASS, IP, MASK, MASK_IP, REGDATE) VALUES ( #{type}, #{type_name}, #{type_class}, #{ip}, #{mask}, #{mask_ip}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE IP = #{ip}
mapper.select: SELECT L.SCH_ID, L.TARGET_ID, L.NAME AS PATH, L.AP_NO, CONCAT(H.USER_NO,'(',U.USER_NAME,')') AS USER_NO, H.CONTENT AS CONTENT, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(H.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'),'') AS REGDATE, CASE WHEN H.REGDATE IS NULL THEN 'RECON' ELSE 'PIC' END AS REGIST, L.STATUS AS SCHEDULE_STATUS, IFNULL(CASE WHEN L.STATUS IN ('completed','stopped','interrupted') THEN FROM_UNIXTIME(L.STARTED,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE '' END, '') AS START_DATE, IFNULL(CASE WHEN L.STATUS IN ('completed','stopped','interrupted') THEN FROM_UNIXTIME(L.UPDATED,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE '' END, '') AS END_DATE FROM PI_SCHEDULED_LOCATION L LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_SCAN_HISTORY H ON L.SCH_ID = H.SCH_ID AND L.AP_NO = H.AP_NO AND L.TARGET_ID = H.TARGET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_USER U ON U.USER_NO = H.USER_NO WHERE L.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} AND L.AP_NO = #{ap_no} ORDER BY SCH_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_scan_history (SCH_ID,TARGET_ID,AP_NO,USER_NO,CONTENT,REGDATE, SCHEDULE_DATE) VALUES (#{sch_id},#{target_Id}, #{ap_no}, #{user_no}, #{content}, NOW(), #{schedule_date})
mapper.select: SELECT P.IDX, P.POLICY_NAME, P.POLICY_VERSION, P.REGDATE, P.COMMENT, P.DATATYPE_ID, P.STD_ID, P.START_DTM, P.CYCLE, P.SCHEDULE_LABEL, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_CPU, P.SCHEDULE_DATA, P.SCHEDULE_MEMORY, P.SCHEDULE_TRACE, P.DMZ, P.MANAGE, P.DEVELOP, P.DEFAULT_CHECK, P.OPEN, P.ENABLE, P.ACTION, P.USER_NO, P.UPDATE_USER_NO, P.POLICY_TYPE FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY P JOIN PI_SCAN_POLICY_SERVER S ON P.IDX = S.POLICY_ID WHERE S.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND S.AP_NO =#{ap_no} AND P.ENABLE = 1

SELECT P.IDX, P.POLICY_NAME, P.POLICY_VERSION, P.REGDATE, P.COMMENT, P.DATATYPE_ID, P.STD_ID, P.START_DTM, P.CYCLE, P.SCHEDULE_LABEL, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_CPU, P.SCHEDULE_DATA, P.SCHEDULE_MEMORY, P.SCHEDULE_TRACE, P.DMZ, P.MANAGE, P.DEVELOP, P.DEFAULT_CHECK, P.OPEN, P.ENABLE, P.ACTION, P.USER_NO, P.UPDATE_USER_NO, P.POLICY_TYPE FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY P JOIN PI_SCAN_POLICY_SERVER S ON P.IDX = S.POLICY_ID WHERE S.TARGET_ID = #{target_id} AND S.AP_NO =#{ap_no} AND P.ENABLE = 1

SELECT P.IDX, P.POLICY_NAME, P.POLICY_VERSION, P.REGDATE, P.COMMENT, P.DATATYPE_ID, P.STD_ID, P.START_DTM, P.CYCLE, P.SCHEDULE_LABEL, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_CPU, P.SCHEDULE_DATA, P.SCHEDULE_MEMORY, P.SCHEDULE_TRACE, P.DMZ, P.MANAGE, P.DEVELOP, P.DEFAULT_CHECK, P.OPEN, P.ENABLE, P.ACTION, P.USER_NO, P.UPDATE_USER_NO, P.POLICY_TYPE FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY P #JOIN PI_SCAN_POLICY_SERVER S ON P.IDX = S.POLICY_ID WHERE P.OPEN = 1 AND P.ENABLE = 1 GROUP BY P.IDX;

SELECT P.IDX, P.POLICY_NAME, P.POLICY_VERSION, P.REGDATE, P.COMMENT, P.DATATYPE_ID, P.STD_ID, P.START_DTM, P.CYCLE, P.SCHEDULE_LABEL, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_DAYS, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_MONTH, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_FROM_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO, P.SCHEDULE_PAUSE_TO_MINU, P.SCHEDULE_CPU, P.SCHEDULE_DATA, P.SCHEDULE_MEMORY, P.SCHEDULE_TRACE, P.DMZ, P.MANAGE, P.DEVELOP, P.DEFAULT_CHECK, P.OPEN, P.ENABLE, P.ACTION, P.USER_NO, P.UPDATE_USER_NO, P.POLICY_TYPE FROM PI_SCAN_POLICY P WHERE P.IDX = #{policy_id} AND P.ENABLE = 1

select.if: SELECT (SELECT LOCATION_ID FROM pi_locations WHERE description = 'All local files' AND TARGET_ID =#{target_id} AND AP_NO =#{ap_no}) AS id, T.platform, CASE WHEN INSTR(UPPER(T.PLATFORM), 'WINDOWS') > 0 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(F.PATH, '\\', (LENGTH(F.PATH) - LENGTH(REPLACE(F.PATH,'\\','')))),'\\') ELSE CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(F.PATH, '/', (LENGTH(F.PATH) - LENGTH(REPLACE(F.PATH,'/','')))),'/') END AS path FROM pi_data_processing DP, pi_find F, pi_targets T WHERE DP.DATA_PROCESSING_GROUP_IDX= #{group_id} AND DP.HASH_ID = F.HASH_ID AND DP.TARGET_ID = F.TARGET_ID AND DP.AP_NO = F.AP_NO AND T.TARGET_ID = F.TARGET_ID AND T.AP_NO = F.AP_NO;

SELECT (SELECT LOCATION_ID FROM pi_locations WHERE description = 'All local files' AND TARGET_ID =#{target_id} AND AP_NO =#{ap_no}) AS id, PATH_EX AS path FROM pi_path_exception WHERE PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP_IDX = #{group_id};

update.if: UPDATE pi_data_processing_group SET research_flag = 1 WHERE idx = #{group_id}
UPDATE pi_path_exception_group SET research_flag = 1 WHERE idx = #{group_id}
